obj_aqua_enemy_slash_Step_0_gml_15_0: Uee hee hee!!&Now, your turn,&your turn!!/%
obj_aqua_enemy_slash_Step_0_gml_83_0: Uuu, what is this!?&"Pain?" How funny!!/%
obj_aqua_enemy_slash_Step_0_gml_84_0: Did you know?^1&You should try&some too!/%
obj_aqua_enemy_slash_Step_0_gml_88_0: Kris, a human!^3&Attack is ~1!^3&Defense is ~2!^3&Magic is... none!^3&Has a knife!/%
obj_aqua_enemy_slash_Step_0_gml_89_0: Huh!? You have&a knife too!?^1&Why don't you&use it...?/%
obj_aqua_enemy_slash_Step_0_gml_90_0: Uuu, you're&wearing a ribbon,&holding a knife...&and blue...?/%
obj_aqua_enemy_slash_Step_0_gml_91_0: Uuu, who's who?&I'm confused now!&Uee hee hee hee!/%
obj_aqua_enemy_slash_Step_0_gml_94_0: Hee hee! What's going&on!?^1 Is the whole&world revolving!?/%
obj_aqua_enemy_slash_Step_0_gml_95_0: Haha! Your feet are&making such strange&music!/%
obj_aqua_enemy_slash_Step_0_gml_97_0: Are we part of&a team now, too!?/%
obj_aqua_enemy_slash_Step_0_gml_98_0: Hee hee, is that&how you fight?^1 So,&if I praise enough,&I'll win too?/%
obj_aqua_enemy_slash_Step_0_gml_99_0: I'm the best!&I'm the best!&Hee hee,&I'm winning!/%
obj_aqua_enemy_slash_Step_0_gml_105_0: Hum, is that all you&can do?/%
obj_aqua_enemy_slash_Step_0_gml_106_0: After all,&humans are actually&a little boring!/%
obj_aqua_enemy_slash_Step_0_gml_108_0: Uee hee hee,&this is all&so much fun!/%
obj_aqua_enemy_slash_Step_0_gml_114_0: Playing a game!^1&Do you want to&play, too!?/%
obj_aqua_enemy_slash_Step_0_gml_115_0: What!?^1 NO!!&If you keep&fighting, you'll&end up.../%
obj_aqua_enemy_slash_Step_0_gml_116_0: Uuu? What, what?&End up what?^1&Is it another&type of game...?/%
obj_aqua_enemy_slash_Step_0_gml_119_0: That's not what&I'm saying!!!&Just give up!!^2&I'm going to&retreat, too!/%
obj_aqua_enemy_slash_Step_0_gml_214_0: HAHA! What is that!?&Can humans change&their shape so!?/%
obj_aqua_enemy_slash_Step_0_gml_379_0: * Playful knives juggle in the air.
obj_aqua_enemy_slash_Step_0_gml_387_0: * The enemy analyzes the stats of random things.
obj_aqua_enemy_slash_Step_0_gml_390_0: * The enemy revolves. The world revolves, too.
obj_aqua_enemy_slash_Step_0_gml_393_0: * The enemy dances, dances, falls, and dances.
obj_aqua_enemy_slash_Step_0_gml_396_0: * The enemy makes a patient's wristband out of a ribbon.
obj_aqua_enemy_slash_Step_0_gml_399_0: * The enemy invents several million new poses.
obj_aqua_enemy_slash_Step_0_gml_402_0: * The enemy praises herself under her breath for every action.
obj_aqua_enemy_slash_Step_0_gml_409_0: * The enemy seems damaged, but having fun.
